sentences.target: Ich nehme den Kuchen ohne Obers.

translations.de: Ich nehme den Kuchen ohne Obers.
translations.en: I'll take the cake without cream.
translations.fr: Je prends le gâteau sans chantilly.
translations.zh-Hans: 我要这块蛋糕，不要奶油。
translations.yue: 我要嗰件蛋糕，唔要忌廉。
translations.he: אני אקח את העוגה בלי קצפת.
translations.vi: Cho tôi bánh không kem tươi.
translations.nl: Ik neem de taart zonder slagroom.
translations.el: Θα πάρω το κέικ χωρίς σαντιγί.
translations.ja: ケーキは生クリームなしでお願いします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting an accusative object and a PP ('ohne Obers') expressing exclusion.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Kuchen'.
Common noun, masculine, accusative singular; direct object of 'nehme'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces PP expressing exclusion ('ohne Obers').
Common noun, neuter mass noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'ohne'.

sentences.target: Der Kaffee schmeckt mit Obers milder.

translations.de: Der Kaffee schmeckt mit Obers milder.
translations.en: The coffee tastes milder with cream.
translations.es: El café sabe más suave con nata.
translations.fr: Le café est plus doux avec de la crème.
translations.it: Il caffè è più delicato con la panna.
translations.zh-Hans: 加了奶油的咖啡味道更柔和。
translations.ru: Кофе мягче на вкус со сливками.
translations.pt: O café fica mais suave com creme de leite.
translations.tr: Kahve krema ile daha yumuşak oluyor.
translations.vi: Cà phê sẽ dịu hơn khi thêm kem béo.
translations.hi: क्रीम डालने से कॉफी का स्वाद हल्का हो जाता है।
translations.el: Ο καφές είναι πιο ήπιος με κρέμα.
translations.id: Kopi terasa lebih lembut dengan krim.
translations.ro: Cafeaua are un gust mai fin cu smântână.
translations.ja: コーヒーはクリームを入れるとまろやかになります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Kaffee'.
Common noun, masculine, nominative singular; subject of 'schmeckt'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb taking a predicative adjective ('milder') and a PP ('mit Obers').
Preposition governing dative; introduces the prepositional object 'mit Obers'.
Common noun, neuter mass noun, dative singular; object of 'mit'.
Adjective in comparative degree, predicative complement (subject predicative) with 'schmecken'.

translations.en: There's still cream in the fridge.
translations.es: Aún queda nata en la nevera.
translations.fr: Il reste de la crème au frigo.
translations.it: C'è ancora della panna in frigo.
translations.pt: Ainda tem creme de leite na geladeira.
translations.vi: Trong tủ lạnh vẫn còn kem béo.
translations.ar: لا تزال هناك كريمة في الثلاجة.
translations.nl: In de koelkast staat nog room.
translations.hi: फ्रिज में अभी भी क्रीम है।
translations.nb: Det står fortsatt fløte i kjøleskapet.
translations.sv: Det finns fortfarande grädde i kylen.
translations.da: Der står stadig fløde i køleskabet.
translations.ja: 冷蔵庫にまだクリームがあります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem' (ADP + definite article, dative); introduces a locative PP requiring dative.
Common noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (location).
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive, expressing location.
Adverb indicating continuation ('still'); modifies 'steht'.
Common noun, neuter mass noun, nominative singular; subject after verb-second inversion.

sentences.target: Ich gebe dir noch etwas Obers.

translations.de: Ich gebe dir noch etwas Obers.
translations.en: I'll give you some more cream.
translations.es: Te pongo un poco más de nata.
translations.fr: Je t'ajoute encore un peu de chantilly.
translations.it: Ti metto ancora un po' di panna.
translations.ru: Я положу тебе ещё немного взбитых сливок.
translations.pt: Vou te colocar mais um pouco de chantili.
translations.he: אני אתן לך עוד קצת קצפת.
translations.vi: Tôi múc cho bạn thêm chút kem tươi.
translations.nl: Ik doe je nog wat slagroom erbij.
translations.uk: Дам тобі ще трохи збитих вершків.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें थोड़ी और क्रीम दूँगा।
translations.pl: Nałożę ci jeszcze trochę bitej śmietany.
translations.el: Θα σου βάλω λίγο ακόμα σαντιγί.
translations.nb: Jeg gir deg litt mer krem.
translations.id: Aku tambahkan sedikit lagi krim untukmu.
translations.sv: Jag lägger på lite mer grädde till dig.
translations.da: Jeg giver dig lidt mere flødeskum.
translations.ja: クリームをもう少しのせますね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; ditransitive, taking a dative recipient and an accusative theme.
Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, dative; indirect object/recipient of 'gebe'.
Adverb indicating an additional amount ('some more'); modifies the quantity of the direct object.
Indefinite quantifier used attributively as a determiner; modifies the mass noun 'Obers'.
Common noun, neuter mass noun, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'gebe'.

Ich gebe dir noch etwas Obers.

Der Kaffee schmeckt mit Obers milder.
Ich gebe dir noch etwas Obers.
en: I'll take the cake without cream.
The coffee tastes milder with cream.
There's still cream in the fridge.
I'll give you some more cream.
